answer:
Ihave the full chain. I could not execute code (the kernel tool was deniedin
this harness), so the coefficient derivations below are done by hand and
cross-checked against two independently banked diagnostics: the Cycle-12
leading coefficient [П„вӮғВІ]О” = wedge([W]_E,[Bnum]_E), and the Codex
coeff_component_rank=2, zeros_all_B3=O(p) scan. They agree, which is the main
external check available to me.

  вҸөвҸө don't ask on (shift+tb to cycle)

  Setup and the one structural identity that drives everything

  Ledgers kept separate: B=F_p (q_gen=p), F=F_{pВІ}=BвҠ•ОұB with П„:ОұвҶҰвҲ’Оұ, q_chal
  unused.D=F_p,n=p,t=Пғ=2,j=nвҲ’a=3,co-supportT=DвҲ–S,|T|=3,П„_i=e_i(T)вҲҲB,
  L_T=XВівҲ’П„вӮҒXВІ+П„вӮӮXвҲ’П„вӮғ, L_D=X^pвҲ’X=L_SВ·L_T.

  From W=L_S Q_S+I_S, multiply by L_T and use L_D=L_S L_T:

L_TВ·I_S=L_TВ·WвҲ’L_DВ·Q_Sвҹ№[L_T]_E[I_S]_E=[W]_E[L_T]_EвҲ’[L_D]_E[Q_S]_E
  =: A.

  So with C := [Bnum]_E[L_T]_E, the route-board quadric is

О”=AвҲ§C=([L_T]_E[I_S]_E)вҲ§([L_T]_E[Bnum]_E)=det(M_{L_T})В·([I_S]_EвҲ§
  [Bnum]_E),

  because for a 2Г—2 multiplication operator M on F[X]/Eвү…FВІ,
  (Mu)вҲ§(Mv)=det(M)(uвҲ§v).Heredet(M_{L_T})=Res(L_T,E)=вҲҸ_{E(ПҒ)=0}L_T(ПҒ).SinceE
  is nonzero on D its roots ПҒвҲүDвҠҮT, so L_T(ПҒ)вү 0 and Res(L_T,E)вү 0 for every valid
co-support. Two consequences:

  - О”=0 вҹә [I_S]_E вҲ§ [Bnum]_E = 0 вҹә landing. The resultant factor is a
  nonvanishingdecoration,soО”faithfullydetectslandings(nospuriouszeros,
  no missed ones).

-О” = Res(L_T,E)В·Оҙisanidentityofrationalfunctions(Оҙ=[I_S]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E
  carries 1/Res because [I_S]_E=AВ·M_{L_T}^{-1}). It is not a polynomial
  factorization,sothereisno forced common factorsneakinginthroughthe
  resultant. This kills the most natural false-positive for a shared component.

  1. Explicit О”вӮҖ, О”вӮҒ via the П„вӮғ-quadratic form

  [L_T]_E and [Q_S]_E are affine-linear in П„ (coordinates in basis {1,X},
  E=XВІ+eвӮҒX+eвӮҖ):

[L_T]_E:const(eвӮҒeвӮҖ,eвӮҒВІвҲ’eвӮҖ);вҲӮП„вӮҒ(eвӮҖ,eвӮҒ);вҲӮП„вӮӮ(0,1);вҲӮП„вӮғ(вҲ’1,0)

[Q_S]_E:const(W_{n-3}вҲ’W_{n-1}eвӮҖ,W_{n-2}вҲ’W_{n-1}eвӮҒ);вҲӮП„вӮҒ
  (вҲ’W_{n-2},вҲ’W_{n-1});  вҲӮП„вӮӮ (W_{n-1},0);  вҲӮП„вӮғ (0,0)

  [W]_E,[L_D]_E,[Bnum]_EвҲҲF[X]/E are П„-independent. Hence A=M_V[L_T]_EвҲ’M_О»[Q_S]_E
  andC=M_ОІ[L_T]_Eareaffine-linearinП„,soО”=AвҲ§Cisagenuinequadric.
  Crucially П„вӮғ enters only through the constant [L_T]_E-vector (вҲ’1,0), i.e.
through aвҒҪВівҒҫ=вҲ’[W]_E, cвҒҪВівҒҫ=вҲ’[Bnum]_E (the quotient Q_S is П„вӮғ-free).So

О”=ОәВ·П„вӮғВІ+L(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)В·П„вӮғ+Q(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ),Оә=[W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_EвҲҲF,

  with L affine-linear and Q a quadric in (П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ), both F-valued. The П„вӮғВІ
  coefficientОәreproducesthebankedCycle-12valueexactlyвҖ”myconsistency
  anchor. Representative mixed coefficient (hand-derived):

[П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О”=вҲ’[W]_EвҲ§[XВ·Bnum]_EвҲ’[XВ·W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E+W_{n-1}В·[L_D]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E.

  Splitting each F-coefficient c=cвӮҖ+ОұcвӮҒ over the B-basis {1,Оұ} (legitimate
  becauseП„_iвҲҲB):

О”вӮҖ=ОәвӮҖП„вӮғВІ+LвӮҖП„вӮғ+QвӮҖ,О”вӮҒ=ОәвӮҒП„вӮғВІ+LвӮҒП„вӮғ+QвӮҒ,ОәвӮҖ,ОәвӮҒвҲҲB,L_i,Q_iвҲҲB[П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ].

  coeff_component_rank=2 (Codex) вҹә О”вӮҒвүў0 and О”вӮҒвҲқМёО”вӮҖ: genuinely two base quadrics,
  asthecrackpredicted.

  2. Common factor вҹә a classified resonance; generic coprimality

  A common nonconstant factor gвҲҲ\bar B[П„] of О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ is linear or quadratic, and:

  - g divides both вҹ№ gвҲЈО”=О”вӮҖ+ОұО”вӮҒ over \bar F, with g defined over \bar B.

-Converselysucha\bar B-factorofО”producesacommonfactorofО”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ.

  So shared component вҹә either (a) О” is an F*-multiple of a quadric defined over
  \bar B, or (b) О” has a linear factor defined over \bar B.

  Now use the П„вӮғ-degree. Assume Оәвү 0 with both ОәвӮҖ,ОәвӮҒвү 0 (the generic leading
  configuration).Form

ОҰ:=ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ=(ОәвӮҒLвӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖLвӮҒ)П„вӮғ+(ОәвӮҒQвӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖQвӮҒ),

  which has П„вӮғ-degree вүӨ 1 (the П„вӮғВІ terms cancel by construction).

  - Quadratic common factor (case a): then О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒвҲқg over \bar B, so ОҰвҲқg too; but
  gвҲқО”вӮҖhasП„вӮғ-degree2whileОҰhasП„вӮғ-degreeвүӨ1вҖ”impossibleunlessОҰвүЎ0,i.e.
  ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖвүЎОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ, i.e. О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ are B-proportional, i.e. О”вҲҲF*В·B[П„]. That is exactly
stratum (a), and it forces a testable alignment: every coefficientratio
[П„_iП„_j]О” / Оә вҲҲ \bar B. E.g. ([П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О”)/([W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E)вҲҲBisoneF-into-B

condition(codimensionвүҘ1onsourcedata).Generic(W,E,Bnum)violateit.

-Linearcommonfactor(caseb):О”reduciblewitha\bar B-descendedfactorвҖ”
  the rank-вүӨ2 condition on the 4Г—4 symmetric matrix of the projective quadric,
  plusadescentcondition.ProperZariski-closed.

  Therefore, outside the union of

  - R0 = {Оә = [W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E = 0} (the global/tangent endpoint already named in
  Cycles11вҖ“12),

-Ra = {О” вҲҲ F*В·\bar B[П„]}(full-coefficientF/Balignment),and

-Rb = {О” reducible with a \bar B linear factor},

-R0 = {Оә = [W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E = 0}(theglobal/tangentendpointalreadynamedin
Cycles 11вҖ“12),
- Ra = {О” вҲҲ F*В·\bar B[П„]}(full-coefficientF/Balignment),and
breducilewith a \bar B linear factor},

О”вӮҖandО”вӮҒhaveno common linear or quadratic factor.Thisprovestaskitem2
  in the conditional form the prompt allows ("outside classified strata"), and
  thestrataareexactlylow-degreeresonancescutoutbyexplicitinvariants.

  3. Finite-field point count off the strata

  With no common factor, V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)вҠӮAВі is a complete intersection: by Krull's
  principal-idealtheoremeverycomponenthascodimensionвүӨ2(dimвүҘ1),anddim
  вүӨ1 since a 2-dimensional component would be common to V(О”вӮҖ) and V(О”вӮҒ), i.e. a
common factor. So V is pure dimension вүӨ1. By BГ©zout in PВі, twoquadric
surfaces with no common component meetinacurveofdegreeвүӨ4,so

#{П„вҲҲBВі:О”(П„)=0}=#V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)(F_p)вүӨ4p+O(1)=O(p).

  Since each landing co-support T is a B-triple with О”(П„)=0, and the slope z is
  uniqueperT(bankedCycle2,[Bnum]_Eвү 0),droppingthe"distinct-roots/
  D-split cubic" constraint over-counts upward:

C2вүӨ#landingsвүӨ#{П„вҲҲBВі:О”(П„)=0}=O(p)=O(n)(offR0вҲӘRaвҲӘRb).

  This recovers C2=O(n) without any fixed-slope fiber theorem, matching
  zeros_all_B3=O(p)anddominatingtheobservedmax_C2=5.

4. The shared-component strata: what they actually are

  Refuting the optimistic reading, the coprimality is not unconditional вҖ” Ra and
  Rbarerealandarepreciselythecandidate-counterpacketloci:

  - R0 (Оә=0): [W]_EвҲҘ[Bnum]_E. This is the tangent/global endpoint; a ROUTE_CUT
  already coveredbythetangent/globalseparation.Notnew.

-Ra (О”вӮҒвүЎcО”вӮҖ, single B-quadric)andRb (\bar B-linear factor):hereV(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)
  acquires a 2-dimensional B-component, so up to Оҳ(pВІ) split cubics can land and
  thebase-componentmethodgoessilent.Thesearenotautomaticallyharmless
  and not the tangent cut; they are a genuine new common-factor/resonance
invariant that only the fixed-slope fiber-collapse theorem (theP1wall)can
resolve. They are also thin (proper algebraicstratainsource-dataspace)and

sitatПғ=2,i.e.sub-reserveвҖ”sotheycannotbepromotedtoa

corrected-reservecounterpackethere.

  So this run does not produce a counterpacket; it isolates the exact locus
  whereonewouldhavetolive.

Final classification

  BANKABLE_LEMMA (conditional / generic), with a sharpened EXACT_NEW_WALL
  attachedвҖ”samepostureasCycles9and12.

  Bankable content (ledgers separate, q_gen=p, q_line=pВІ, q_chal unused;
  sub-reserveatПғ=2;noconj:B,noprotocol/MCA/CA/list-/line-decoding,no
  q_gen collapse):

  1. Faithfulness: О”=Res(L_T,E)В·([I_S]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E) with Res(L_T,E)вү 0 on all
  validco-supports,soО”detectslandingsexactlyandcarriesnoforced
  resultant factor.

2.О”=ОәП„вӮғВІ+L(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)П„вӮғ+Q(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ),Оә=[W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E;О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒвҲҲB[П„]aretwoquadrics,
  generically rank 2 (О”вӮҒвүў0, О”вӮҒвҲқМёО”вӮҖ).

3.OffthestrataR0вҲӘRaвҲӘRb,О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒarecoprime(П„вӮғ-degreeargumenton
  ОҰ=ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ), hence V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ) is a curve of degree вүӨ4 and C2 вүӨ #landings =
  O(p)=O(n).

  Residual wall left open (do not bank as resolved):

W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-BASE-COMPONENT-RESONANCE:

onRa={О”вҲҲF*В·\barB[П„]}andRb={О”hasa\barB-linearfactor},thebase

quadricsshareasurfacecomponent;boundorrefutetheslopecountthere

(thisisexactlywherefixed-slopefiber-collapse,
  W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-FIBER-COLLAPSE,

isstillrequired).

  Caveat on rigor: the coefficient formulas (Оә, [П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О”, the aвҒҪвҒұвҒҫ/cвҒҪКІвҒҫ tables)
  arehand-derivedbecausecodeexecutionwasunavailableinthisharness;they
  are consistent with the independently banked [П„вӮғВІ]О”=wedge([W]_E,[Bnum]_E) and
with the Codex rank=2/O(p) scan, but a fresh symbolic recomputationofallsix
quadratic coefficients and an explicitdefining-idealcheckofRa/Rbisthe

naturalverificationstepbeforethisleavesAUDITstatus.

surfaces with no common component meetinacurveofdegreeвүӨ4,so

#{П„вҲҲBВі:О”(П„)=0}=#V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)(F_p)вүӨ4p+O(1)=O(p).

  Since each landing co-support T is a B-triple with О”(П„)=0, and the slope z is
  uniqueperT(bankedCycle2,[Bnum]_Eвү 0),droppingthe"distinct-roots/
  D-split cubic" constraint over-counts upward:

C2вүӨ#landingsвүӨ#{П„вҲҲBВі:О”(П„)=0}=O(p)=O(n)(offR0вҲӘRaвҲӘRb).

  This recovers C2=O(n) without any fixed-slope fiber theorem, matching
  zeros_all_B3=O(p)anddominatingtheobservedmax_C2=5.

4. The shared-component strata: what they actually are

  Refuting the optimistic reading, the coprimality is not unconditional вҖ” Ra and

invariant that only the fixed-slope fiber-collapse theorem (theP1wall)can

Final classification

  generically rank 2 (О”вӮҒвүў0, О”вӮҒвҲқМёО”вӮҖ).

recoveredAnswer:
I have the full chain. I could not execute code (the kernel tool was denied in this harness), so the coefficient derivations below are done by hand and cross-checked against two independently banked diagnostics: the Cycle-12 leading coefficient `[П„вӮғВІ]О” = wedge([W]_E,[Bnum]_E)`, and the Codex `coeff_component_rank=2`, `zeros_all_B3=O(p)` scan. They agree, which is the main external check available to me.

## Setup and the one structural identity that drives everything

Ledgers kept separate: `B=F_p` (`q_gen=p`), `F=F_{pВІ}=BвҠ•ОұB` with `П„:ОұвҶҰвҲ’Оұ`, `q_chal` unused. `D=F_p`, `n=p`, `t=Пғ=2`, `j=nвҲ’a=3`, co-support `T=DвҲ–S`, `|T|=3`, `П„_i=e_i(T)вҲҲB`, `L_T=XВівҲ’П„вӮҒXВІ+П„вӮӮXвҲ’П„вӮғ`, `L_D=X^pвҲ’X=L_SВ·L_T`.

From `W=L_S Q_S+I_S`, multiply by `L_T` and use `L_D=L_S L_T`:

```
L_TВ·I_S = L_TВ·W вҲ’ L_DВ·Q_S   вҹ№   [L_T]_E[I_S]_E = [W]_E[L_T]_E вҲ’ [L_D]_E[Q_S]_E =: A.
```

So with `C := [Bnum]_E[L_T]_E`, the route-board quadric is

```
О” = A вҲ§ C = ([L_T]_E[I_S]_E) вҲ§ ([L_T]_E[Bnum]_E) = det(M_{L_T})В·([I_S]_E вҲ§ [Bnum]_E),
```

because for a 2Г—2 multiplication operator `M` on `F[X]/Eвү…FВІ`, `(Mu)вҲ§(Mv)=det(M)(uвҲ§v)`. Here `det(M_{L_T})=Res(L_T,E)=вҲҸ_{E(ПҒ)=0}L_T(ПҒ)`. Since `E` is nonzero on `D` its roots `ПҒвҲүDвҠҮT`, so `L_T(ПҒ)вү 0` and **`Res(L_T,E)вү 0` for every valid co-support**. Two consequences:

- `О”=0 вҹә [I_S]_E вҲ§ [Bnum]_E = 0 вҹә` landing. The resultant factor is a nonvanishing decoration, so `О”` faithfully detects landings (no spurious zeros, no missed ones).
- `О” = Res(L_T,E)В·Оҙ` is an identity of **rational** functions (`Оҙ=[I_S]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E` carries `1/Res` because `[I_S]_E=AВ·M_{L_T}^{-1}`). It is *not* a polynomial factorization, so there is **no forced common factor** sneaking in through the resultant. This kills the most natural false-positive for a shared component.

## 1. Explicit О”вӮҖ, О”вӮҒ via the П„вӮғ-quadratic form

`[L_T]_E` and `[Q_S]_E` are affine-linear in `П„` (coordinates in basis `{1,X}`, `E=XВІ+eвӮҒX+eвӮҖ`):

```
[L_T]_E:  const (eвӮҒeвӮҖ, eвӮҒВІвҲ’eвӮҖ);  вҲӮП„вӮҒ (eвӮҖ, eвӮҒ);  вҲӮП„вӮӮ (0,1);  вҲӮП„вӮғ (вҲ’1,0)
[Q_S]_E:  const (W_{n-3}вҲ’W_{n-1}eвӮҖ, W_{n-2}вҲ’W_{n-1}eвӮҒ);  вҲӮП„вӮҒ (вҲ’W_{n-2},вҲ’W_{n-1});  вҲӮП„вӮӮ (W_{n-1},0);  вҲӮП„вӮғ (0,0)
```

`[W]_E,[L_D]_E,[Bnum]_EвҲҲF[X]/E` are `П„`-independent. Hence `A=M_V[L_T]_EвҲ’M_О»[Q_S]_E` and `C=M_ОІ[L_T]_E` are affine-linear in `П„`, so `О”=AвҲ§C` is a genuine quadric. **Crucially `П„вӮғ` enters only through the constant `[L_T]_E`-vector `(вҲ’1,0)`**, i.e. through `aвҒҪВівҒҫ=вҲ’[W]_E`, `cвҒҪВівҒҫ=вҲ’[Bnum]_E` (the quotient `Q_S` is П„вӮғ-free). So

```
О” = ОәВ·П„вӮғВІ + L(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)В·П„вӮғ + Q(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ),   Оә = [W]_E вҲ§ [Bnum]_E вҲҲ F,
```

with `L` affine-linear and `Q` a quadric in `(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)`, both `F`-valued. The `П„вӮғВІ` coefficient `Оә` reproduces the banked Cycle-12 value exactly вҖ” my consistency anchor. Representative mixed coefficient (hand-derived):

```
[П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О” = вҲ’[W]_EвҲ§[XВ·Bnum]_E вҲ’ [XВ·W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E + W_{n-1}В·[L_D]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E.
```

Splitting each `F`-coefficient `c=cвӮҖ+ОұcвӮҒ` over the `B`-basis `{1,Оұ}` (legitimate because `П„_iвҲҲB`):

```
О”вӮҖ = ОәвӮҖП„вӮғВІ + LвӮҖП„вӮғ + QвӮҖ,   О”вӮҒ = ОәвӮҒП„вӮғВІ + LвӮҒП„вӮғ + QвӮҒ,   ОәвӮҖ,ОәвӮҒвҲҲB, L_i,Q_iвҲҲB[П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ].
```

`coeff_component_rank=2` (Codex) вҹә `О”вӮҒвүў0` and `О”вӮҒвҲқМёО”вӮҖ`: genuinely **two** base quadrics, as the crack predicted.

## 2. Common factor вҹә a classified resonance; generic coprimality

A common nonconstant factor `gвҲҲ\bar B[П„]` of `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ` is linear or quadratic, and:

- `g` divides both `вҹ№ gвҲЈО”=О”вӮҖ+ОұО”вӮҒ` over `\bar F`, with `g` defined over `\bar B`.
- Conversely such a `\bar B`-factor of `О”` produces a common factor of `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ`.

So **shared component вҹә either (a) `О”` is an `F*`-multiple of a quadric defined over `\bar B`, or (b) `О”` has a linear factor defined over `\bar B`.**

Now use the П„вӮғ-degree. Assume `Оәвү 0` with both `ОәвӮҖ,ОәвӮҒвү 0` (the generic leading configuration). Form

```
ОҰ := ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖ вҲ’ ОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ = (ОәвӮҒLвӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖLвӮҒ)П„вӮғ + (ОәвӮҒQвӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖQвӮҒ),
```

which has **П„вӮғ-degree вүӨ 1** (the П„вӮғВІ terms cancel by construction).

- Quadratic common factor (case a): then `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒвҲқg` over `\bar B`, so `ОҰвҲқg` too; but `gвҲқО”вӮҖ` has П„вӮғ-degree 2 while `ОҰ` has П„вӮғ-degree вүӨ1 вҖ” impossible unless `ОҰвүЎ0`, i.e. `ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖвүЎОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ`, i.e. `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ` are `B`-proportional, i.e. `О”вҲҲF*В·B[П„]`. That is exactly stratum (a), and it forces a *testable* alignment: every coefficient ratio `[П„_iП„_j]О” / Оә вҲҲ \bar B`. E.g. `([П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О”)/([W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E)вҲҲB` is one `F`-into-`B` condition (codimension вүҘ1 on source data). Generic `(W,E,Bnum)` violate it.
- Linear common factor (case b): `О”` reducible with a `\bar B`-descended factor вҖ” the rank-вүӨ2 condition on the 4Г—4 symmetric matrix of the projective quadric, plus a descent condition. Proper Zariski-closed.

Therefore, **outside the union of**
- **R0 = `{Оә = [W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E = 0}`** (the global/tangent endpoint already named in Cycles 11вҖ“12),
- **Ra = `{О” вҲҲ F*В·\bar B[П„]}`** (full-coefficient `F/B` alignment), and
- **Rb = `{О” reducible with a \bar B linear factor}`**,

`О”вӮҖ` and `О”вӮҒ` have **no common linear or quadratic factor**. This proves task item 2 in the conditional form the prompt allows ("outside classified strata"), and the strata are exactly low-degree resonances cut out by explicit invariants.

## 3. Finite-field point count off the strata

With no common factor, `V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)вҠӮAВі` is a complete intersection: by Krull's principal-ideal theorem every component has codimension вүӨ2 (dim вүҘ1), and dim вүӨ1 since a 2-dimensional component would be common to `V(О”вӮҖ)` and `V(О”вӮҒ)`, i.e. a common factor. So `V` is pure dimension вүӨ1. By BГ©zout in `PВі`, two quadric surfaces with no common component meet in a curve of degree вүӨ4, so

```
#{ П„вҲҲBВі : О”(П„)=0 } = #V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)(F_p) вүӨ 4p + O(1) = O(p).
```

Since each landing co-support `T` is a `B`-triple with `О”(П„)=0`, and the slope `z` is unique per `T` (banked Cycle 2, `[Bnum]_Eвү 0`), dropping the "distinct-roots / `D`-split cubic" constraint over-counts upward:

```
C2 вүӨ #landings вүӨ #{П„вҲҲBВі : О”(П„)=0} = O(p) = O(n)   (off R0вҲӘRaвҲӘRb).
```

This recovers `C2=O(n)` **without** any fixed-slope fiber theorem, matching `zeros_all_B3=O(p)` and dominating the observed `max_C2=5`.

## 4. The shared-component strata: what they actually are

Refuting the optimistic reading, the coprimality is **not** unconditional вҖ” Ra and Rb are real and are precisely the candidate-counterpacket loci:

- **R0 (`Оә=0`)**: `[W]_EвҲҘ[Bnum]_E`. This is the tangent/global endpoint; a **ROUTE_CUT already covered** by the tangent/global separation. Not new.
- **Ra (`О”вӮҒвүЎcО”вӮҖ`, single `B`-quadric)** and **Rb (`\bar B`-linear factor)**: here `V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)` acquires a 2-dimensional `B`-component, so up to `Оҳ(pВІ)` split cubics can land and the base-component method goes **silent**. These are *not* automatically harmless and *not* the tangent cut; they are a **genuine new common-factor/resonance invariant** that only the fixed-slope fiber-collapse theorem (the P1 wall) can resolve. They are also thin (proper algebraic strata in source-data space) and sit at `Пғ=2`, i.e. **sub-reserve** вҖ” so they cannot be promoted to a corrected-reserve counterpacket here.

So this run does not produce a counterpacket; it isolates the exact locus where one would have to live.

## Final classification

**BANKABLE_LEMMA** (conditional / generic), with a sharpened **EXACT_NEW_WALL** attached вҖ” same posture as Cycles 9 and 12.

Bankable content (ledgers separate, `q_gen=p`, `q_line=pВІ`, `q_chal` unused; sub-reserve at `Пғ=2`; no `conj:B`, no protocol/MCA/CA/list-/line-decoding, no `q_gen` collapse):

1. Faithfulness: `О”=Res(L_T,E)В·([I_S]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E)` with `Res(L_T,E)вү 0` on all valid co-supports, so `О”` detects landings exactly and carries no forced resultant factor.
2. `О”=ОәП„вӮғВІ+L(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)П„вӮғ+Q(П„вӮҒ,П„вӮӮ)`, `Оә=[W]_EвҲ§[Bnum]_E`; `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒвҲҲB[П„]` are two quadrics, generically rank 2 (`О”вӮҒвүў0`, `О”вӮҒвҲқМёО”вӮҖ`).
3. Off the strata `R0вҲӘRaвҲӘRb`, `О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ` are coprime (П„вӮғ-degree argument on `ОҰ=ОәвӮҒО”вӮҖвҲ’ОәвӮҖО”вӮҒ`), hence `V(О”вӮҖ,О”вӮҒ)` is a curve of degree вүӨ4 and `C2 вүӨ #landings = O(p)=O(n)`.

Residual wall left open (do not bank as resolved):

```
W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-BASE-COMPONENT-RESONANCE:
on Ra={О”вҲҲF*В·\bar B[П„]} and Rb={О” has a \bar B-linear factor}, the base
quadrics share a surface component; bound or refute the slope count there
(this is exactly where fixed-slope fiber-collapse, W-F1-AA-RES-T2J3-FIBER-COLLAPSE,
is still required).
```

Caveat on rigor: the coefficient formulas (`Оә`, `[П„вӮӮП„вӮғ]О”`, the `aвҒҪвҒұвҒҫ`/`cвҒҪКІвҒҫ` tables) are hand-derived because code execution was unavailable in this harness; they are consistent with the independently banked `[П„вӮғВІ]О”=wedge([W]_E,[Bnum]_E)` and with the Codex `rank=2`/`O(p)` scan, but a fresh symbolic recomputation of all six quadratic coefficients and an explicit defining-ideal check of Ra/Rb is the natural verification step before this leaves AUDIT status.
